    <td id="Card13041053" class="OneColLarge">

            </tr>

<td id="Card13041057" class="container GridSmall" width="295" height="240" style="background-color: #FFFFFF; vertical-align: top; ">

    <table width="295" height="100%" align="center" style="height: 100%; background-color: #FFFFFF; " cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0">
        <tbody>
            <tr height="160" style="box-shadow: 0px 5px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); ">
                <td>
                    <a id="Href13041057" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAACNCRW5W257UEW2VDNFHL3JWHTYBGVHEAL7SB56DP6RBQZWEFO5RZDOOZGTBP2RKXTP2QADUYO3THR7OLJBWEXK7Z7PO7DMISJWZXPUT6L4T3GFNSWPDJWIX4WALCWII2VSSAAXSEBWPQLOKLMPVF53UBBLXXOJ3VNLQHVSUE526GXR6ETY4C&" target="_blank">

                    </a>
                </td>
            </tr>

            <tr style="height: 100%;">
                <td id="Title13041057" style="padding: 10px 10px 0px 10px; font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #333333; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: top; background-color: #FFFFFF;" width="295" height="40">

                        'Mass Casualty' Confirmed After Plane Crash in Northern Alberta:…
                    </a>
                </td>

<tr>

        <div align="center" style="font-family:Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif;font-size: 20px; font-weight:normal;">
